framework_step: Design · Step 1 of 12: Identify the use case, user journey, and access channels

use_case_definition.service_name: Autonomous Multi-Channel Farmer Subsidy Application, Review, & Payment System
use_case_definition.bounded_scope: Processing localized seasonal crop-loss relief subsidy claims and executing Direct Benefit Transfer payouts via state ledgers.
use_case_definition.citizen_persona: Smallholder rural cultivator experiencing severe crop damage, needing to apply for financial relief without physical travel or digital literacy barriers.
use_case_definition.government_mandate: Verify the citizen's identity, validate geofenced plot boundaries, confirm seasonal crop records, evaluate claim legitimacy using confidence metrics, and execute secure treasury payouts.
use_case_definition.interaction_termination: Vocal, visual, or textual transmission of an official PM-KISAN Ledger Payment Transaction ID (for successful passes) or an encrypted Caseworker Escalation Case ID (for threshold fallbacks).

channel_01_ivr_voice.target_segment: Non-literate citizens, elderly farmers, and feature phone users in low-connectivity areas.
channel_01_ivr_voice.technical_implication: Requires active probabilistic processing layers (BHASHINI ASR and NMT) to convert voice sounds into standardized administrative data strings.
channel_01_ivr_voice.security_profile: Voice-prompt tokenization using automated telephone routing identifiers.

channel_02_whatsapp.target_segment: Smartphone users in regions with active mobile internet connectivity.
channel_02_whatsapp.technical_implication: Bypasses acoustic speech-to-text layers. Conversational text inputs route directly to local LLM entity-parsing systems.
channel_02_whatsapp.security_profile: Meta-verified messaging session keys paired with opt-in consent menus.

channel_03_ussd.target_segment: Feature phone users with near-zero data connectivity or lower text-literacy rates.
channel_03_ussd.technical_implication: Zero AI blocks required. Runs entirely on a deterministic, server-side numerical menu tree.
channel_03_ussd.security_profile: Direct SIM-card cryptographic routing over cellular communication signals.

channel_04_sms_notification.channel_type: Short Message Service (SMS) Broadcast Outbound Rail
channel_04_sms_notification.target_segment: Asynchronous, network-wide transaction receipt distribution across all mobile devices.
channel_04_sms_notification.technical_implication: Zero inbound processing. Restricted strictly to transactional template delivery engines.

step_01_initiation_and_channel_entry.action: Citizen initiates contact based on device and connectivity access.

infrastructure_dependencies.telephony_trunk_rail: State NIC/BSNL Cloud SIP Gateway Exchange Core (Interconnected with All National Operators: Jio, Airtel, Vi)
infrastructure_dependencies.messaging_broker_rail: Meta Business API Cloud Ingestion Framework
infrastructure_dependencies.signaling_network_rail: Cellular Carrier USSD Core Network Infrastructure Nodes (Cross-Operator SS7/SIGTRAN Routing Gates)

telecom_signaling_payload.description: Incoming raw network signaling event data envelope containing SIP trunk audio bytes, Meta HTTP POST webhook payload, or USSD telecom signaling context string.

ivr_audio_stream_uri.description: Populated strictly if ingress_channel == IVR_VOICE. Contains the persistent real-time streaming protocol endpoint (e.g., rtp:// URI) capturing live acoustic telephony bytes for downstream ASR consumption.

whatsapp_cleartext_string.description: Populated strictly if ingress_channel == WHATSAPP. Contains the cleartext incoming message payload.

ussd_collected_payload.description: Populated strictly if ingress_channel == USSD via network menu entry steps.

farmer_id_cleartext.description: Raw account or national identification unique numeric string captured via USSD digit entry arrays.

district_name.description: Standardized regional district name translated from the captured USSD menu digit choice (e.g., 'Sirsa').

crop_type.description: Normalized agricultural crop matching foundational core categories, translated from the captured USSD menu digit choice (e.g., 'Cotton').

branching_logic.if_ivr_voice: Farmer dials toll-free gateway; system initializes real-time acoustic audio stream buffer.
branching_logic.if_whatsapp: Farmer texts 'Muavza' to official number; chatbot initializes menu interface.
branching_logic.if_ussd: Farmer dials *147#; telco cell routes sequential numerical menu arrays to capture farmer inputs into ussd_collected_payload.

text.body: सरसा में मेरी कपास फसल गुलाबी सुंडी ने नष्ट कर दी

whatsapp.whatsapp_cleartext_string: सरसा में मेरी कपास फसल गुलाबी सुंडी ने नष्ट कर दी

step_02_speech_to_text_transcription.action: Convert raw vernacular acoustic speech waves into written characters.
step_02_speech_to_text_transcription.execution_scope: Triggered exclusively for IVR Voice channel. BHASHINI ASR filters background agricultural noise and runs perimeter sanitization.

infrastructure_dependencies.speech_intelligence_engine: Digital India BHASHINI Framework National ASR Inference Cluster

sample_rate_hz.##_rationale: 16kHz wideband matches BHASHINI ASR native deep-learning training vectors, preserving regional phonetic variations without doubling transit size.

channels.##_rationale: Forcing mono (1 channel) drops cellular network bandwidth payload overhead in half compared to stereo since there is only a single caller source.

bit_depth.##_rationale: 16-bit linear PCM provides a 96dB dynamic range, allowing background acoustic noise filtering layers to cleanly isolate rural human speech.

codec.##_rationale: Uncompressed linear PCM bypasses CPU transcoding latency cycles and avoids lossy cellular compression degradation of regional dialects.

unstructured_vernacular_string.description: Populated strictly if ingress_channel == IVR_VOICE. Contains the raw unstructured text payload transcribed from the voice session script characters.

example_output.unstructured_vernacular_string: सिरसा में इस बार मेरी नरमा कपास की फसल गुलाबी सुंडी से खराब हो गई...

step_03_text_translation_and_normalizati.action: Normalize regional terminology and dialects into standard administrative terms.
step_03_text_translation_and_normalizati.execution_scope: Applies to IVR Voice and WhatsApp text inputs. BHASHINI NMT translates regional agricultural idioms while clearing adversarial text strings.

infrastructure_dependencies.translation_intelligence_engine: Digital India BHASHINI Framework National NMT Translation Hub

unstructured_text_input.description: Raw string containing regional dialect or vernacular characters.

standardized_english_string.description: Unified administrative language string with localized crop anomalies normalized.

example_input.unstructured_text_input: सिरसा में इस बार मेरी नरमा कपास की फसल गुलाबी सुंडी से खराब हो गई...

example_output.standardized_english_string: In Sirsa district, this time my cotton crop has been destroyed by pink bollworm infestation...

step_04_structured_field_entity_extracti.action: Parse the standardized input text into clean system variables via local LLM parsing.
step_04_structured_field_entity_extracti.execution_scope: Applies to IVR Voice and WhatsApp tracks. Bypassed completely for USSD channel. Integrates runtime adversarial ingestion firewall analysis.

infrastructure_dependencies.local_inference_runtime: LLM Local Background Execution Engine Instance
infrastructure_dependencies.hardware_allocation_profile: MacBook Pro Unified Memory Architecture Unified Silicon Pool

extraction_confidence.description: Mathematical model extraction score. Automatically zeroed down to 0.00 if adversarial intent or instruction overrides are flagged.

farmer_id_cleartext.description: Raw account or national identification unique numeric string parsed from conversation dialogue.

district_name.description: Extracted regional district administrative geographical zone boundary normalized to system mapping layouts.

crop_type.description: Normalized agricultural crop matching foundational core data registry categories.

reported_anomaly.description: Extracted damage classification or target biological pest vector.

example_input.target_text: In Sirsa district, this time my cotton crop has been destroyed by pink bollworm infestation...

step_05_identity_perimeter_tokenization.action: Enforce absolute perimeter data masking and validate core citizen identity against sovereign records.
step_05_identity_perimeter_tokenization.execution_scope: All channels converge here. Executes strictly inside volatile RAM to satisfy zero-trust privacy mandates.

infrastructure_dependencies.privacy_perimeter_engine: DPG Privacy-by-Design Local Hashing Middleware (MOSIP/GovStack Pattern)
infrastructure_dependencies.identity_verification_rail: National Identity Verification Protocol Hub Interconnect

raw_identity_payload.description: Contains the raw farmer identity numbers extracted from conversational text fields or direct USSD signaling digits.

identity_verified.description: True if the national identity provider authenticates the citizen record successfully.

tokenized_identity_hash.description: Irreversible 64-character SHA-256 system token hash substituting the cleartext identification numbers at the edge perimeter.
tokenized_identity_hash.##_rationale: Guarantees complete legal alignment with global data protection laws and the India DPDP Act 2023 by preventing cleartext identity leakages down backend tables.

step_06_agricultural_registry_crossmatch.action: Cross-examine land parcel records, ownership parameters, and seasonal crop sown claims using masked tokens.
step_06_agricultural_registry_crossmatch.execution_scope: All channels. Completely insulated from cleartext PII identity strings.

infrastructure_dependencies.core_agricultural_registry: Federated AgriStack Ecosystem (Farmer Registry, Farmland Plot Registry, Crop Sown Registry)

agricultural_assertions.description: Unified payload configuration container. Binds structured conversational strings or matches carrier menu digits.

district_name.description: Populated via step_04 extracted entity string or mapped via step_01 state district code lookup tables.

registry_match_flag.description: True if geofenced land parcel ownership and state seasonal crop verification cross-checks align perfectly across AgriStack ledger tables.

cadastral_plot_id.description: Verified state boundary georeferenced land registry plot map index token pointer.

step_07_social_benefits_registry_submiss.action: Stage and register the validated application within the central benefits framework.

infrastructure_dependencies.benefits_orchestration_platform: OpenSPP Social Protection Platform Core Registry Architecture APIs

verification_result.description: Consumes the successful registry alignment flag passed down from the prior verification step.

step_08_governance_threshold_evaluation.action: Evaluate model extraction metrics and registry match flags against sovereign thresholds to verify processing readiness.

infrastructure_dependencies.rules_engine_cluster: State Department of Agriculture & Farmer Welfare Business Rules Core Engine

llm_confidence_score.description: Evaluated model extraction value passed down directly from the step_04 output payload.
llm_confidence_score.##_rationale: Defaults to 1.0 for deterministic USSD sessions because menu inputs run on a strict fixed numeric system tree with zero translation or voice acoustic risks.

registry_match_flag.description: Sovereign data matching verification flag passed down directly from the step_06 output database contract.

evaluation_passed.description: Deterministic boolean flag asserting if all algorithmic validation boundaries and threshold rules are successfully met.

step_09_governance_routing_engine.action: Parse business rules evaluation flags to split the workflow path into immediate automated clearing or dedicated caseworker incident ticket creation.
step_09_governance_routing_engine.execution_scope: Central system workflow structural router rail.

infrastructure_dependencies.routing_switch_core: State Department of Agriculture & Farmer Welfare Orchestration Router Layer

step_10_automated_payout_disbursement.action: Trigger direct treasury direct benefit transfer (DBT) transfer sequences over national payment clearing networks.
step_10_automated_payout_disbursement.execution_scope: Triggered exclusively for sessions where routing_decision == AUTOMATED_PAYMENT_TRACK.

infrastructure_dependencies.automated_payment_rail: NPCI Aadhaar Payment Bridge System (APBS) / National DBT Treasury Gateway

payment_transaction_id.description: Official sovereign treasury direct clearing identifier token generated on successful settlement clearance with built-in idempotency key verification.

step_11_caseworker_incident_staging.action: Generate a unique state incident tracking token and push the session data to the manual review ledger dashboard.
step_11_caseworker_incident_staging.execution_scope: Triggered exclusively for sessions where routing_decision == HUMAN_IN_THE_LOOP_FALLBACK.

infrastructure_dependencies.human_review_portal: State IFMS (Integrated Financial Management System) District Officer Dashboard Queue Engine

escalation_case_id.description: Cryptographically signed state tracking index token mapping to the open manual case record.

step_12_adaptive_multichannel_confirmati.action: Return the final transaction receipt token back to the user across their source entry channel.

infrastructure_dependencies.voice_synthesis_engine: Digital India BHASHINI Framework National TTS Execution Hub
infrastructure_dependencies.sms_gateway_infrastructure: National CDAC Mobile Seva Gateway Core (NIC-Authorized Headers)

escalation_case_id.description: Consumes the ticket identifier generated by step_11
